zh.lifeSummary: 當Elin Gödekesdotter Fincke於大約1435年出生在芬蘭海賽亞可斯馬吉時，她的父親Gödeke Henriksson Fincke54歲，母親Katarina Nilsdotter Tawast50歲。她於大約1443年與Claus Henriksson Bitz在芬蘭武希馬阿騰霍拉結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1500年在瑞典諾波頓亞爾福斯波格享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elin Gödekesdotter Fincke于大约1435年出生在芬兰海賽亞可斯馬吉时，她的父亲Gödeke Henriksson Fincke54岁，母亲Katarina Nilsdotter Tawast50岁。她于大约1443年与Claus Henriksson Bitz在芬兰武希馬阿騰霍拉结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1500年在瑞典諾波頓亞爾福斯波格享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fincke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Fink
meanings: German, Jewish (Ashkenazic), Danish, and English: nickname for a lively and cheerful person, or, in the case of the Jewish name, an artificial name, from Middle High German vinke, Middle English and Yiddish fink ‘finch’ (see Finch and Vink ). The surname of German origin is also found in some central European countries, for example in Czechia, Slovenia, and Croatia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic nicknames or surnames. In part, this is a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname, originating from the Kočevsko region in Lower Carniola, Slovenia (see Kocevar ).

nameMeanings.name: Elin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Elen
meanings: form of Helen , now also used outside Wales. It is identical with the Welsh vocabulary word elen ‘nymph’, but this is unlikely to be the origin. It is found in Welsh texts from an early period as an equivalent of Helen, for example as the name of the mother of Constantine, finder of the True Cross.

historicEvents.title: The Engelbrekt Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Engelbrekt Engelbrektsson, a Swedish mine owner and statesman, led a rebellion against Eric of Pomerania, King of the Kalmar Union. Sweden was upset with the Danes' interference with Swedish exports and unjust collection of taxes. The Engelbrekt Rebellion led to the deposing of Eric of Pomerania and the eventual dissolution of the Kalmar Union.

historicEvents.title: The Russo-Swedish War
historicEvents.description: While in an alliance with Grand Prince Ivan III of Moscow, King Hans of Denmark and Norway invaded Sweden and was declared King of Sweden.

en.lifeSummary: When Elin Gödekesdotter Fincke was born about 1435, in Sääksmäki, Häme, Finland, her father, Gödeke Henriksson Fincke, was 54 and her mother, Katarina Nilsdotter Tawast, was 50. She married Claus Henriksson Bitz about 1443, in Tenhola, Uusimaa, Finland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1500, in Älvsborg, Norrbotten, Sweden, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elin Gödekesdotter Fincke est née environ 1435, à Sääksmäki, Häme, Finlande, son père, Gödeke Henriksson Fincke, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Katarina Nilsdotter Tawast, avait 50 ans. Elle a épousé Claus Henriksson Bitz environ 1443, à Tenhola, Uusimaa, Finlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1500, à Älvsborg, Norrbotten, Suède, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elin Gödekesdotter Fincke um 1435 in Sääksmäki, Häme, Finnland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gödeke Henriksson Fincke 54 und ihre Mutter Katarina Nilsdotter Tawast 50. Sie hat um 1443 in Tenhola, Uusimaa, Finnland Claus Henriksson Bitz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1500 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Älvsborg, Norrbotten, Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elin Gödekesdotter Fincke è nata il circa 1435 nel Sääksmäki, Häme, Finlandia, sua padre, Gödeke Henriksson Fincke, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Katarina Nilsdotter Tawast, aveva 50 anni. Lei sposato Claus Henriksson Bitz circa 1443, nel Tenhola, Uusimaa, Finlandia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1500, nel Älvsborg, Norrbotten, Svezia, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elin Gödekesdotter Finckeが約1435年にフィンランドhaメスaaクスムaキで生まれた時，父Gödeke Henriksson Finckeは54歳，母Katarina Nilsdotter Tawastは50歳であった。約1443年にフィンランドウウシマアテンhオラでClaus Henriksson Bitzと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1500年にスウェーデンノルボッテンaルvスボルグで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elin Gödekesdotter Fincke(이)가 대략 1435년 핀란드 ha 스aa크스a키에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gödeke Henriksson Fincke(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katarina Nilsdotter Tawast(은)는 50세였다. 그녀는 대략 1443년 핀란드 시마아 텐홀아에서 Claus Henriksson Bitz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 스웨덴 노르벗텐 a브스볼그에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elin Gödekesdotter Fincke nasceu aproximadamente 1435, em Sääksmäki, Häme, Finlândia, seu pai, Gödeke Henriksson Fincke, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Katarina Nilsdotter Tawast, tinha 50 anos. Ela casou-se com Claus Henriksson Bitz aproximadamente 1443, em Tenhola, Uusimaa, Finlândia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1500, em Älvsborg, Norrbotten, Suécia, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elin Gödekesdotter Fincke родилась около 1435 г. в местности сaaксмaки, хaм, Финляндия, её отцу по имени Gödeke Henriksson Fincke было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Katarina Nilsdotter Tawast, 50. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Claus Henriksson Bitz около 1443 г. в местности тенола, уусимаа, Финляндия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1500 г. в местности aлвсборг, норрботтен, Швеция в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elin Gödekesdotter Fincke nació aproximadamente 1435, en Sääksmäki, Häme, Finlandia, su papá, Gödeke Henriksson Fincke, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Katarina Nilsdotter Tawast, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Claus Henriksson Bitz aproximadamente 1443, en Tenhola, Uusimaa, Finlandia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1500, en Älvsborg, Norrbotten, Suecia, a la edad de 66 años.
